title: Order dated 11.06.2013 regarding the unauthorized colonies

text: & GOVT, OF NCI OF DELHI DEPARTMENT OF URBAN DEVELOPMENT 0TH LEVEL "C" WING: DELHI SECRETARIAT LP, ES ATE: NEW DELHI No.F.1-33/UC/UD/Policy/2007/£9 oc'j J..2 \1 ORDER Dated: ! l ) & | ^ 1 % In accordance with para 2.2 of the Revised G u i d e l i n e s - 2 0 0 7 for R e g u i a r i z a t i o n of Unauthorized Colonies in Delhi as notified by the Ministry o f U r b a n D e v e l o p m e n t , Government of India under letter no. O-33011/2/94-DDIIB-Vol-XI d a t e d 5t h O c t o b e r , 2007 and also in accordance with the orders of even number d a t e d 1 2 . 1 2 . 2 0 0 7 and 09.08.2012, the Lt. Governor of NCT of Delhi hereby permits the registration of instruments of sale and transfer of properties in private lands of u n a u t h o r i z e d colonies as per Annexure-I o f order No.1--33/UC/UD/Policy/2012/549-553 dated 4.9 2012 under the following manner: Category (A) Private land i.e. land owned by the private individuals. The registration of instruments of sale and transfer of properties in this category will be allowed as per laid down procedure and formalities under the Registration Acl, 1908 and other applicable laws. Category (8) The notified land i.e. the land notified for acquisition under the Lands Acquisition Act, 1894 but where no awards have been made by the-Collector resulting in lapse of acquisition proceedings under section 11A of The Land Acquisition Act, 1894. i - .-9 c r y ( C ) Awarded land i.e. all such land which has been notified for acquisition undei The Land Acquisition Act, 1394 and the award with respect to the same has also been made by the Coidcior. However, the possession of such land has not yet been taken over and compensation has not been paid. //; inspect of category (B) and (C) lands above , the registration of instruments of sale and transitu oi properties will be allowed after withdrawal of notification issued for acquisition or de -notification oi land under section 48 of The Land Acquisilion Act, 1894, as the case may be Category (D) Vested Gaon Sabha land i.e. the iand vested with the Gaon Sabha under section 81 of the Delhi Land Reforms Act but where physical possession is with private owners or their successor-in-interest. The regisii at ion of instruments of sale and transfer ot properties in this category will be aihwed after required amendments in the revenue records as per law by the Revenue Department. This order is issued in supersession of this office ordpr M n i ^ / n r / UO/Policy/2007/2173-2189 dated 12.3.2013.
